implemented_changes.change: Restricted MODE_OPEN_LOOP to explicit cached raw left/right duty commands instead of reusing generic velocity commands.
Removed the direct PC motor-override poll-loop bypass and exposed RAW/MOTOR as an explicit open-loop command path gated by mode.
Added LINK_MSG_CMD_SET_RAW so the binary host protocol has a distinct raw-duty open-loop command path.

root_cause_summary: Open-loop and closed-loop semantics were blurred because generic velocity commands and a direct PC motor override both bypassed a clear mode contract.
The existing open-loop storage path existed, but it was not the authoritative open-loop command path for host interfaces.

verification.build_blocker: cmake executable not available in current environment
